PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>

  wd:Q618127 p:P726 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P726 ?candidate .
  ?statement pq:P2820 ?electoralVotes .

  OPTIONAL {

    FILTER(LANG(?candidateLabel) = "en")

}
ORDER BY DESC(?votes_count)
LIMIT 1

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>

SELECT ?candidate ?candidateLabel (xsd:integer(?electoralVotes) AS ?votes_count)
WHERE {
  wd:Q618127 p:P726 ?statement.
  ?statement ps:P726 ?candidate.
  ?statement pq:P2820 ?electoralVotes.
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?electoralVotes) > 0)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?candidate rdfs:label ?candidateLabel.
    FILTER(LANG(?candidateLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?votes_count)
LIMIT 1
